title: astragalus bicolor subsp. owerinii
intro: Astragalus bicolor subsp. owerinii, also known as the Owerin's milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to China, used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties. The medicinal properties of Astragalus bicolor subsp. owerinii include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing stress, improving immune function, and enhancing overall well-being. This plant is often used in herbal preparations like teas, capsules, and tinctures, as well as being dried and consumed as a supplement to support its purported health benefits.
